Convert a Raw Vector or R object to C Code

Source: R/rxRaw.R
rxRawToC.Rd

This function converts a raw vector or R object to C code that is used in the rxode2 model

Usage

rxRawToC(raw, type = c("xz", "qs2", "qdata", "base", "bzip2"))

Arguments

raw

vector or R object to convert

type

serialization type; one of "qs2", "qdata", "base", "xz" or "bzip2".

Value

raw vector for conversion to C in the codegen procedure

Author

Matthew L. Fidler

Examples


rxRawToC(mtcars)
#>    [1] 42 5a 68 39 31 41 59 26 53 59 1c df ec 6b 00 04 b9 ff ff ff ff fe 71 d4
#>   [25] 77 ff ff ff f6 ff dd 3f ff ff fe 42 00 a0 34 4c 05 18 40 59 06 60 81 61
#>   [49] 0e 4b 73 50 04 78 34 1b 6b 46 da 55 49 90 c9 11 a4 34 48 f2 9e a3 d4 f5
#>   [73] 3c 05 3c a7 93 24 3d 43 d4 f4 80 d0 34 3d 4c 9a 06 9e a0 d3 c2 35 1a 1e
#>   [97] a1 b2 9a 00 00 00 7a 80 d1 ea 0d 04 20 09 a3 44 69 a2 64 da 8d 1a 7a 20
#>  [121] 34 01 93 40 34 34 00 06 80 68 d1 a6 d4 01 a0 1a 06 99 00 1a 00 91 22 24
#>  [145] d2 03 d4 00 32 1a 07 a3 50 64 03 40 00 34 00 00 00 03 d4 1a 00 00 00 01
#>  [169] a1 a6 88 30 98 23 26 02 60 13 04 c1 01 80 00 4c 00 4c 00 8d 30 86 23 01
#>  [193] 1a 30 8c 26 8d 00 c9 93 20 83 09 82 32 60 26 01 30 4c 10 18 00 04 c0 04
#>  [217] c0 08 d3 08 62 30 11 a3 08 c2 68 d0 0c 99 32 14 76 cf 0f a7 e7 25 7b 1f
#>  [241] 99 4a 67 c5 93 9c e5 4c 88 6a 1d 33 9b b8 90 c7 29 d2 2c 93 43 68 1b 1b
#>  [265] a3 17 2a cd b6 d8 26 4d 81 0d 93 21 b2 1d bb 2d a6 c2 2d e7 04 c7 04 0d

#>  [313] 63 1a 2d d4 e6 90 08 b8 0c d4 20 81 8d 0c 4d 21 a6 95 89 c2 93 17 92 cd
#>  [337] 4d 8d 7a 16 21 31 54 b1 55 88 80 e6 b0 48 46 bd a4 5f 73 21 09 24 ac 30

#>  [505] ea d5 89 0b d6 8d b0 40 54 48 79 1d bf 29 32 d0 87 51 10 01 8d 16 8b d2
#>  [529] 4b 82 74 c9 40 4d 5a 8c f9 4c 04 5f 4a ec 30 b7 17 ef 08 2b ba b9 88 9e
#>  [553] 38 e3 90 77 41 70 6d b5 6a 43 d4 64 03 9c 5e d8 53 af 76 80 49 e4 84 67

#>  [793] 01 53 ee 9b 39 f5 fc d7 a8 37 79 00 62 d5 65 15 b5 f4 2f d3 4e ee fd a1
